arts.ttl: Presenter slaps back at Hugh Keevins over Celtic comments, with Nicolas Kuhn reminder
arts.sum: But presenter Gordon Duncan was quick to remind Keevins of his ‘fickle’ comments because he was questioning Kuhn last season, yet he has proven him wrong and so could Yang. Yang joined Celtic during the summer of 2023 – six months before Kuhn – and he is yet to establish himself in the starting XI.

arts.ttl: Kierney Tierney immediate Celtic transfer return boost emerges as Arsenal starlet’s arrival on big stage triggers exit
arts.sum: Talented youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly has provided Mikel Arteta with another option at left back

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou Celtic insider offers advice Rangers can learn from on hot topic subject
arts.sum: Injuries to key players like Kyogo Furuhashi, David Turnbull and Callum McGregor in the first few months of his start at Celtic made Postecoglou’s job seriously difficult. That was never an issue at Celtic as McElhone explains how the medical department at the club, although listened to, was not the deal-breaker when it came to making big team selection calls under Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers hoping Celtic revel in ‘special atmosphere’ against Young Boys
arts.sum: The Scottish champions are looking to take their tally to 12 points on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Celtic learn bargain Jota price tag as return whispers heighten and Kyogo stance laid bare - Parkhead transfer bulletin
arts.sum: The Portuguese winger is expected to leave Ligue 1 side Rennes this month after being frozen out of the first team by boss Jorge Sampaoli

arts.ttl: Celtic Champions League prize money banked so far and what Young Boys & Aston Villa results could earn
arts.sum: And how much more money could they guarantee themselves with positive results over Young Boys and then Aston Villa, Celtic’s final league phase opponents? By adding both the equal participation fee and performance-related bonuses together, Celtic have so far earned more than £21.06m in guaranteed prize money.

arts.ttl: The Celtic 'perfect story' Brendan Rodgers can't avoid as boss eyes a rare career first
arts.sum: The Hoops face a massive Champions League night under the lights in their bid to reach the knockout stages

arts.ttl: Ex-Celtic star Ryan Christie lauded by Liverpool hero, receives glowing assessment
arts.sum: Ryan Christie was the talk of Sky Sports' Monday Night Football studio.

arts.ttl: The Champions League games Celtic fans need to watch out for as Brendan Rodgers aims for play-offs
arts.sum: Theoretically, Celtic could lose their remaining two matches – at home to Young Boys and then away to Aston Villa – and still finish in the play-off places – those who finish between ninth and 24th will secure those spots. Either way, the Bhoys don’t want to be making the trip to the Midlands on January 29 needing something to book a play-off spot because Unai Emery’s Aston Villa are going to be a painful test.

arts.ttl: I played just 2 games for Celtic but left feeling 'deep injustice' - even if Neil Lennon says I'm talking rubbish
arts.sum: The Hoops have made some forgettable signings over the years and this is right up there
